intake.instructions: Match each riddle to the egg slip you found!
intake.transitionMessage: All eggs registered! Now the REAL challenge begins...

riddles.riddle: Who is Mickey Mouse's tall, clumsy best friend? He trips a lot and laughs funny!
riddles.hint: He's a Disney character and a dog

riddles.riddle: A warrior dressed in black who moves in silence and throws stars...
What stringed instrument does Kermit the Frog play while singing on a log?
riddles.hint: It's round and has strings — not a guitar!

riddles.riddle: What do you say when food tastes SO good you want more?
What wiggly, jiggly treat comes in a bowl and wobbles when you poke it?
riddles.hint: It's a dessert that shakes — not jam!

riddles.riddle: What word means totally crazy, wild, and out there? '___ Races' is a cartoon!
If something is super-duper fast — like a hummingbird — it's really ___!
What's the opposite of serious? Making funny faces and giggling is being ___
What's a sweet nickname that sounds like 'baby' but cuter? Rhymes with 'hubby'
riddles.hint: Starts with B, a term grandma might use

riddles.riddle: What word describes a groovy beat that makes you want to dance? '___ town'
riddles.hint: Starts with F, think disco and funk music

riddles.riddle: What is 15 + 8?
Your normal body temperature in Celsius — when you're healthy, not sick!
What is 6 × 7?
What is 8 × 7?
How many squares on a chess board? 8 rows × 8 columns!
What is 100 – 29?
What is 17 × 5?
What is 46 + 46?
What is 50 – 3?
A piano has 88 keys. Subtract 1. What do you get?

assignments.title: The Great Egg Sum

steps.prompt:
Add ALL your egg numbers together:
23 + 37 + 42 + 56 + 64 + 71 + 85 + 92 + 47 + 87 = ?
Now add the digits of 604 together: 6 + 0 + 4 = ?

assignments.successMessage: You found your first code digit: 1!
assignments.hint: Try adding in pairs: 23+87=110, 37+63=... wait, use your own trick!

assignments.title: The Scale Explorer
assignments.prompt:
Go to the piano! Play a C major scale from Middle C up to the next C.

C – D – E – F – G – A – B – C

How many keys did you press in total?
assignments.bonusText: The octave comes from Latin 'octo' = eight. Too easy for Grade 8!
assignments.hint: Count every key you pressed, including the first C and the last C

assignments.title: Grandma Juliaa's Video Question

video.fallbackText: Grandma Juliaa says: Look at all your funny egg words — WACKY, GOOFY, NINJA, and all the others. How many of those words have the letter N hiding inside them? Count carefully!

assignments.prompt: How many egg words contain the letter N?
assignments.successMessage: Three words with N! Digit 3 unlocked!
assignments.hint: Check each word one by one: W-A-C-K-Y... any N? Now try the next word...

assignments.title: The Hidden Letter
assignments.prompt: What is it? Type the FIRST letter!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Something slithers on the ground, has no legs, and goes hissss...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: A warrior dressed in black who moves in silence and throws stars...

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Listen carefully...
poem: I slither and hiss upon the ground,
I have no legs yet move around,
I shed my skin when I need space —
Now name the answer! Solve this case!

assignments.title: The Alphabet Chain
assignments.prompt:
Remember the number from the piano? It was 8.

Now count in the alphabet:
A=1, B=2, C=3, D=4, E=5, F=6, G=7, ?=8

What letter lives at position 8?
assignments.successMessage: H marks the spot! Letter H unlocked!
assignments.hint: Sing the alphabet and count on your fingers up to 8

assignments.title: Grandma Vera & Grandpa Tolia's Video

video.fallbackText: Христос Воскрес, діточки! Today is a special holiday. In English it's called... what? And what do bunnies hide for you? Both words start with the same letter — which one?

assignments.prompt: What letter do EASTER and EGGS both start with?

assignments.title: The Vlad Equation

steps.prompt:
Your half-brother's name is VLAD.
How many letters in VLAD?

The 4th letter of the alphabet is...?
A(1) · B(2) · C(3) · ?(4)

assignments.successMessage: D as in Daryna, your cousin! Letter D found!
assignments.hint: Count: V-L-A-D. How many is that?

assignments.title: The Semitone Puzzle

steps.prompt:
Back to the piano! How many semitones in one octave?
(C→C#→D→D#→E→F→F#→G→G#→A→A#→B→C)

How many semitones from C to F?
(C→C#→D→D#→E→F)

Add those: 12 + 5 = 17
Now add your very first digit (from Assignment 1): 17 + 1 = ?

assignments.successMessage: 18 is the FIRST number of the combination lock!
assignments.hint: Count every key including black ones

assignments.title: The Cousin Calculator

video.fallbackText: Привіт! Can you count how many letters are in each cousin's name? Andrii, Svyatik, Katiia, Nastiia, Daryna. Add them all up! Then add all the aunts, uncles, and grandparents too!

table.label: Count the letters in each name:

followUp.prompt:
Now add the family count:
Aunt Katiia + Aunt Lida + Uncle Oleksandr + Aunt Natalia + Grandma Vera + Grandpa Tolia = 6

32 + 6 = ?

assignments.successMessage: 38 is the SECOND number of the combination lock!
assignments.hint: Spell each name out loud and count on your fingers

assignments.title: The Mirror Riddle
poem: I am a number, not too small,
I start the lock, and I end it all.
The first and last are just the same —
Can you guess my secret name?
assignments.prompt:
The FIRST number of the lock was 18.
What is the THIRD and last number?
assignments.hint: Read the riddle again — 'first and last are just the same'

assignments.title: The Secret Place

video.fallbackText: Something small sits in the backyard. What could it be?

poem: A tiny house where tools all sleep,
Where garden secrets like to keep,
The mower rests, the rakes stand tall —
Now spell this place and win it all!
assignments.successMessage: The word is SHED! That's where the treasure is!
assignments.hint: It's a small building in the backyard where Dad keeps tools!

assignments.title: The Vanishing Trick
assignments.prompt: What is it? Type the FIRST letter!
assignments.successMessage: Hats off to you! Letter H confirmed!

message.title: YOU CRACKED BOTH CODES!
message.instruction: RUN TO THE SHED! Use the combination on the lock and claim your Easter treasure! 🐰🎁🍫
